text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Is that a character from Uma ☆ Love in your notebook? Did you draw it? It's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
M-my friend must have drawn it when I lent her
my notebook. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... What a terrible dream... My heart's still racing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be busy tomorrow, so I'd better go
back to sleep... Come on... Fall asleep...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Agh! I can't sleep at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober ends up staying awake all night...
